body: The function assumes that the start date of the simulation is January, which is not necessarily true. ~~To fix this, the PR discards the first initial year. The other alternative that I haven't try is to prepend and append `NaN`s so every vector in `var_global_average` is of length 12.~~ I decided to prepend `NaN`s for the first year instead of discarding it. The plot produced now look like this.
title: Fix plotting bug with annual timeseries
